description_long: This is a large, modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The aircraft features four cylindrical turbofan engines, two under each wing, and a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The nose is rounded and houses a forward-placed, enclosed cockpit with dark window panels. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable and stowed within the fuselage or wings. The exterior is smooth and metallic, predominantly light gray in color, with no visible markings or livery.
description: A large, sleek commercial jet airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, swept-back low wings, and a conventional tail. The body is smooth, metallic, and light gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and all four turbofan engines under the swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, two visible engines under the wing, and the conventional tail assembly.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, wing sweep, and the symmetrical layout of the engines and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the fuselage, two engines, and the tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two on each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable tricycle configuration based on typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and dark window panels.
